title: United Kingdom Private Limited Company Incorporation (Form IN01)
description: Register (incorporate) a private company limited by shares with Companies House using form IN01, made under Section 9 of the Companies Act 2006. Scoped to the single-director, single-subscriber, single-share-class case most relevant to an individual forming their own company (the GB counterpart to a US single-member LLC formation) — the common case where one person is the sole director, the sole initial shareholder/subscriber, and the sole person with significant control (PSC). Public companies, companies limited by guarantee, unlimited companies, corporate directors/secretaries, multiple share classes, multiple subscribers, multiple PSCs, and 'other registrable persons'/'relevant legal entities' are out of scope of this document; see VERIFICATION.md. It does not submit the registration; the live gov.uk/Companies House source is always authoritative.

source.documentRef: IN01 (Application to register a company), version 12.0, February 2026

verification.notes: Source-derived reference schema authored from the GOV.UK 'Register your company' guidance flow (limited-company-formation/*) and the current IN01 PDF (v12.0, Feb 2026), retrieved from assets.publishing.service.gov.uk and transcribed field-by-field from the PDF's decompressed content streams (each of sections A1-A10, D1-D6, F1-F3, H1-H2, I1-I7, L1, M1, N1, and P1 was read in full). This is the first GovSchema company-formation schema in any jurisdiction, closing a gap the discovery README had flagged since GOV-36 (four other company-formation candidates exist across US-CA, IE, and CA-ON but none had been authored). Scope was deliberately narrowed to the single-director/single-subscriber/single-PSC private-limited-by-shares case: v0.2 has no repeating-group or array field model (SPEC.md §6.1; composite/repeating values are tracked separately as GSP-0009), so the form's inherently repeatable sections (additional directors, additional subscribers, additional PSCs, multiple share classes/currencies) cannot be represented structurally and are out of scope rather than force-fit. Corporate directors/secretaries (Sections C, E), companies limited by guarantee (Section G), 'relevant legal entity' and 'other registrable person' PSCs (Sections J, K), and public/unlimited company types are likewise out of scope. Status remains 'draft'. See VERIFICATION.md for the full sourced-field mapping and open items.

fields.name: companyName
fields.label: Proposed company name in full
fields.description: Must be checked for availability and against naming rules (duplicate/'same as' names, sensitive words, offensive names) before submission; must end in 'Limited' or 'Ltd' ('Cyfyngedig' or 'Cyf' for a Welsh company) unless the applicant separately qualifies for and applies for the guarantee/charity name-ending exemption, which this document does not model (private-limited-by-shares scope only).

fields.name: sicCode1
fields.label: Principal business activity — classification code 1
fields.description: UK SIC (Standard Industrial Classification) 2007 code from Companies House's condensed list, e.g. 62012. Required unless businessActivityDescription is given instead.

fields.name: sicCode2
fields.label: Classification code 2 (optional)
fields.description: Up to 4 SIC codes may be given in total.

fields.name: sicCode3
fields.label: Classification code 3 (optional)
fields.description: Up to 4 SIC codes may be given in total.

fields.name: sicCode4
fields.label: Classification code 4 (optional)
fields.description: Up to 4 SIC codes may be given in total.

fields.name: businessActivityDescription
fields.label: Business activity description (if no code can be determined)
fields.description: A brief free-text description of the company's business activity, used only when no SIC code applies.

fields.name: registeredOfficeSituation
fields.label: Situation of registered office
fields.description: Exactly one nation. Determines which nation the registeredOffice* address must be located in: England-and-Wales/Wales companies need an England-or-Wales address; Scotland and Northern Ireland companies need an address in that nation respectively.
fields.sourceRef: Section A6 — Situation of registered office

fields.name: registeredOfficeAddressLine1
fields.label: Registered office address — building name/number and street
fields.description: Every company must have a registered office, the address to which the Registrar sends correspondence; it appears on the public record. Must be an 'appropriate address' (post addressed there would be expected to come to a person acting for the company, and delivery can be confirmed) — a Royal Mail PO Box alone is no longer permitted. The source form splits this into 'Building name/number' and 'Street'; this document combines them into one line per registry convention (cf. gb/co/register-to-vote).

fields.name: registeredOfficeAddressLine2
fields.label: Registered office address — post town / county or region (optional)
fields.description: Combines the source form's separate 'Post town' and 'County/Region' lines.

fields.name: registeredOfficePostcode
fields.label: Registered office — postcode
fields.description: UK postcode, e.g. SW1A 1AA.

fields.name: registeredEmailAddress
fields.label: Registered email address
fields.description: Must be an address emails from the Registrar would be expected to reach a person acting for the company. Only one address is given. Not shown on the public record.

fields.name: articlesOption
fields.label: Articles of association
fields.description: For a private company limited by shares (this document's scope): adopt the model articles for that company type unamended, adopt them with additional/amended provisions (a copy must be attached), or adopt entirely bespoke articles (a copy must be attached).

fields.name: restrictedArticles
fields.label: Do the articles contain provision for entrenchment?
fields.description: Tick if the articles are 'restricted' (contain entrenchment provisions).

fields.name: directorTitle
fields.label: Director's title (optional)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: directorFirstNames
fields.label: Director's forename(s)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. This document scopes to a single individual director; a private company must appoint at least one director who is an individual. Corporate directors and additional individual directors are out of scope.

fields.name: directorSurname
fields.label: Director's surname
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: directorFormerNames
fields.label: Director's former name(s) (optional)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Any previous names, including maiden or married names, used for business purposes in the last 20 years.

fields.name: directorNationality
fields.label: Director's nationality
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: directorCountryOfResidence
fields.label: Director's country/state of residence
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: directorDateOfBirth
fields.label: Director's date of birth
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. YYYY-MM-DD. A director must be 16 or over. Only the month and year appear on the public record; the full date is collected but withheld from public disclosure (Section D3 is not shown on the public record).
fields.sourceRef: Section D1 / D3 — Director's date of birth

fields.name: directorServiceAddressSameAsRegisteredOffice
fields.label: Is the director's service address the company's registered office?
fields.description: If true, directorServiceAddress* fields are not separately required.

fields.name: directorServiceAddressLine1
fields.label: Director's service address — building name/number and street
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Appears on the public record; does not have to be the director's usual residential address. Required unless directorServiceAddressSameAsRegisteredOffice is true.

fields.name: directorServiceAddressLine2
fields.label: Director's service address — post town / county or region (optional)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: directorServiceAddressCountry
fields.label: Director's service address — country
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Unlike the registered office, a director's service address is not restricted to the UK.

fields.name: directorServiceAddressPostcode
fields.label: Director's service address — postcode
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: directorResidentialAddressSameAsServiceAddress
fields.label: Is the director's usual residential address the same as their service address?
fields.description: Cannot be true if the service address was stated as 'the company's registered office' — a full residential address is required in that case. This section is not shown on the public record.
fields.sourceRef: Section D4 — Director's usual residential address

fields.name: directorResidentialAddressLine1
fields.label: Director's usual residential address — building name/number and street
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Not shown on the public record. Required unless directorResidentialAddressSameAsServiceAddress is true. Cannot be a PO Box, DX, or Scottish legal-post number.
fields.sourceRef: Section D4 — Director's usual residential address

fields.name: directorResidentialAddressLine2
fields.label: Director's usual residential address — post town / county or region (optional)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Not shown on the public record.
fields.sourceRef: Section D4 — Director's usual residential address

fields.name: directorResidentialAddressCountry
fields.label: Director's usual residential address — country
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Not shown on the public record.
fields.sourceRef: Section D4 — Director's usual residential address

fields.name: directorResidentialAddressPostcode
fields.label: Director's usual residential address — postcode
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Not shown on the public record.
fields.sourceRef: Section D4 — Director's usual residential address

fields.name: directorSection243ExemptionApplied
fields.label: Is the director applying for, or has been granted, a Section 243 exemption?
fields.description: A section 243 exemption prevents the director's usual residential address being disclosed to credit reference agencies. If applying with this notice, the whole form must be posted (not filed online) to the Registrar of Companies, PO Box 4082, Cardiff CF14 3WE.

fields.name: directorIdentityVerified
fields.label: Has the director verified their identity under s1110A of the Companies Act 2006?
fields.description: Statutory requirement: an individual director must have verified their identity (via GOV.UK One Login or an Authorised Corporate Service Provider) before or as part of appointment/incorporation.
fields.sourceRef: Section D5 — Director's identity verification details

fields.name: directorPersonalCode
fields.label: Director's Companies House personal code
fields.description: An 11-character code issued to a person once they have verified their identity with Companies House. Personal to the individual, not to any company. Required to accompany a true directorIdentityVerified in most cases.
fields.sourceRef: Section D6 — Companies House personal code

fields.name: directorNameMatchesVerifiedName
fields.label: Does the name given for the director match their verified name?
fields.description: Non-statutory information. If false, give directorNameMismatchReason.
fields.sourceRef: Section D6 — Director's identity verification details

fields.name: directorNameMismatchReason
fields.label: If the names don't match, why?
fields.description: Only relevant when directorNameMatchesVerifiedName is false.
fields.sourceRef: Section D6 — Director's identity verification details

fields.name: shareCurrency
fields.label: Currency of share capital
fields.description: ISO 4217 currency code, e.g. GBP. This document scopes to a single currency and a single class of shares; the source form supports a separate table per currency and per class.

fields.name: shareClassName
fields.label: Class of shares
fields.description: E.g. 'Ordinary'.

fields.name: numberOfSharesIssued
fields.label: Number of shares
fields.description: Total number of shares of this class issued on incorporation.

fields.name: nominalValuePerShare
fields.label: Nominal value of each share
fields.description: In shareCurrency.

fields.name: aggregateNominalValue
fields.label: Aggregate nominal value
fields.description: Number of shares issued multiplied by nominal value, in shareCurrency.

fields.name: aggregateAmountUnpaid
fields.label: Aggregate amount unpaid, if any
fields.description: Total unpaid on the shares, including any share premium, in shareCurrency. Defaults to 0 (fully paid) if not given.

fields.name: prescribedParticularsOfShares
fields.label: Prescribed particulars of rights attached to the shares
fields.description: Must describe: any voting rights (including rights arising only in certain circumstances); any rights to participate in a dividend distribution; any rights to participate in a capital distribution (including on winding up); and whether the shares are redeemable at the option of the company or the shareholder.
fields.sourceRef: Section F2 — Prescribed particulars of rights attached to shares

fields.name: subscriberName
fields.label: Subscriber's name
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. The subscriber is the initial shareholder who subscribes their name to the memorandum of association. This document scopes to a single subscriber, matching the single-director/single-shareholder individual use case; the source form supports multiple subscribers.

fields.name: subscriberAddressLine1
fields.label: Subscriber's address — building name/number and street
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Appears on the public record; does not have to be the subscriber's usual residential address.

fields.name: subscriberAddressLine2
fields.label: Subscriber's address — post town / county or region (optional)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: subscriberAddressCountry
fields.label: Subscriber's address — country
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: subscriberAddressPostcode
fields.label: Subscriber's address — postcode
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: statementOfNoSignificantControl
fields.label: Statement of no significant control
fields.description: Tick only if the company knows or has reason to believe there will be no person with significant control (registrable person) or registrable relevant legal entity on incorporation. If true, the pscFirstNames/pscSurname/... fields are not applicable. Uncommon in the single-shareholder case this document scopes to.
fields.sourceRef: Section H2 — Statement of no PSC

fields.name: pscFirstNames
fields.label: PSC's forename(s)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Required unless statementOfNoSignificantControl is true. This document scopes to a single individual PSC (often the same person as the director/subscriber); registrable relevant legal entities and 'other registrable persons' are out of scope.

fields.name: pscSurname
fields.label: PSC's surname
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Required unless statementOfNoSignificantControl is true.

fields.name: pscFormerNames
fields.label: PSC's former name(s) (optional)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: pscNationality
fields.label: PSC's nationality
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Required unless statementOfNoSignificantControl is true.

fields.name: pscCountryOfResidence
fields.label: PSC's country/state of residence
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Required unless statementOfNoSignificantControl is true.

fields.name: pscDateOfBirth
fields.label: PSC's date of birth
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. YYYY-MM-DD. Required unless statementOfNoSignificantControl is true. Full date is collected but not shown on the public record.
fields.sourceRef: Section I3 — Individual's date of birth

fields.name: pscServiceAddressSameAsRegisteredOffice
fields.label: Is the PSC's service address the company's registered office?
fields.description: If true, pscServiceAddress* fields are not separately required.

fields.name: pscServiceAddressLine1
fields.label: PSC's service address — building name/number and street
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Appears on the public record; does not have to be the PSC's usual residential address.

fields.name: pscServiceAddressLine2
fields.label: PSC's service address — post town / county or region (optional)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: pscServiceAddressCountry
fields.label: PSC's service address — country
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: pscServiceAddressPostcode
fields.label: PSC's service address — postcode
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: pscResidentialAddressSameAsServiceAddress
fields.label: Is the PSC's usual residential address the same as their service address?
fields.description: This section is not shown on the public record.
fields.sourceRef: Section I4 — Individual's usual residential address

fields.name: pscResidentialAddressLine1
fields.label: PSC's usual residential address — building name/number and street
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Not shown on the public record. Required unless pscResidentialAddressSameAsServiceAddress is true. Cannot be a PO Box, DX, or Scottish legal-post number.
fields.sourceRef: Section I4 — Individual's usual residential address

fields.name: pscResidentialAddressLine2
fields.label: PSC's usual residential address — post town / county or region (optional)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Not shown on the public record.
fields.sourceRef: Section I4 — Individual's usual residential address

fields.name: pscResidentialAddressCountry
fields.label: PSC's usual residential address — country
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Not shown on the public record.
fields.sourceRef: Section I4 — Individual's usual residential address

fields.name: pscResidentialAddressPostcode
fields.label: PSC's usual residential address — postcode
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Not shown on the public record.
fields.sourceRef: Section I4 — Individual's usual residential address

fields.name: pscSection790ZFExemptionApplied
fields.label: Is the PSC applying for, or has been granted, a Section 790ZF exemption?
fields.description: A section 790ZF exemption prevents the PSC's usual residential address being disclosed to credit reference agencies. If applying with this notice, the whole form must be posted (not filed online) to the Registrar of Companies, PO Box 4082, Cardiff CF14 3WE.

fields.name: pscShareOwnershipBand
fields.label: PSC's ownership of shares
fields.description: The percentage of shares the PSC holds directly or indirectly, if this is a nature of their control. Tick only one band.
fields.sourceRef: Section I7 — Nature of control for an individual

fields.name: pscVotingRightsBand
fields.label: PSC's ownership of voting rights
fields.description: The percentage of voting rights the PSC holds directly or indirectly, if this is a nature of their control. Tick only one band.
fields.sourceRef: Section I7 — Nature of control for an individual

fields.name: pscRightToAppointRemoveDirectors
fields.label: Does the PSC hold the right to appoint or remove a majority of directors?
fields.description: Directly or indirectly.
fields.sourceRef: Section I7 — Nature of control for an individual

fields.name: pscSignificantInfluenceOrControl
fields.label: Does the PSC have significant influence or control by other means?
fields.description: Only tick if none of pscShareOwnershipBand, pscVotingRightsBand, or pscRightToAppointRemoveDirectors applies. At least one nature-of-control field must be set for a registered PSC.
fields.sourceRef: Section I7 — Nature of control for an individual

fields.name: pscIdentityVerified
fields.label: Has the PSC verified their identity under s1110A of the Companies Act 2006?
fields.description: Statutory requirement introduced alongside director identity verification. Required unless statementOfNoSignificantControl is true.
fields.sourceRef: Section I5 — PSC's identity verification details

fields.name: pscPersonalCode
fields.label: PSC's Companies House personal code
fields.description: An 11-character code issued once the PSC has verified their identity with Companies House. Only complete if the PSC has verified their identity and shared their personal code.
fields.sourceRef: Section I6 — PSC's identity verification details

fields.name: pscNameMatchesVerifiedName
fields.label: Does the name given for the PSC match their verified name?
fields.description: Non-statutory information. If false, give pscNameMismatchReason.
fields.sourceRef: Section I6 — PSC's identity verification details

fields.name: pscNameMismatchReason
fields.label: If the names don't match, why?
fields.description: Only relevant when pscNameMatchesVerifiedName is false.
fields.sourceRef: Section I6 — PSC's identity verification details

fields.name: consentToActConfirmed
fields.label: Consent statement: each named director has consented to act
fields.description: The subscribers confirm that the person named as director has consented to act in that capacity.

fields.name: individualPscParticularsConfirmed
fields.label: Statement about individual PSC particulars
fields.description: The subscribers confirm the individual PSC knows their particulars are being supplied as part of this application. Required only when an individual PSC has been named (i.e. statementOfNoSignificantControl is not true).
fields.sourceRef: Section M1 — Particulars of an individual PSC

fields.name: lawfulPurposeConfirmed
fields.label: Lawful purpose statement
fields.description: The subscribers confirm they wish to form the company for lawful purposes.

fields.name: deliveredByAgent
fields.label: Is the application delivered by an agent on behalf of all subscribers?
fields.description: Routes to the agent's statement of compliance (Section P2, give agentName) if true, or the subscriber's own statement of compliance (Section P1, give subscriberPrintedName) if false.

fields.name: agentName
fields.label: Agent's printed name
fields.description: Required only when deliveredByAgent is true. A signature is not required, only a printed name; this will appear on the public record.
fields.sourceRef: Section P2 — Statement of compliance delivered by an agent

fields.name: subscriberPrintedName
fields.label: Subscriber's printed name
fields.description: Required only when deliveredByAgent is false. Every subscriber to the memorandum of association must authenticate the statement of compliance; this document's single-subscriber scope needs only one name. A signature is not required, only a printed name; this will appear on the public record.
fields.sourceRef: Section P1 — Statement of compliance delivered by the subscribers

steps.title: Registered office and registered email address
Consent, lawful purpose, and statement of compliance
